# Moonforge Digital — by Ram Lajola

> Video Editor, Graphic Designer & AI Specialist based in the Philippines

## About

Ram Lajola is a multidisciplinary creative professional from the Philippines with over 5 years of experience and 50+ completed projects for 30+ clients. He specializes in video editing, graphic design, and AI-powered creative solutions for brands and content creators worldwide.

## Services

### Video Editing & Shorts Creation
Professional editing for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok. Services include cinematic color grading, motion graphics, dynamic transitions, and trending audio-visual effects. Tools: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects.

### Graphic & Product Design
Logo design, YouTube thumbnails, YouTube channel art, product mockups, packaging design, label branding, and advertising campaigns. Tools: Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma.

### AI Creative Solutions
AI-powered creative workflows for visual content generation, image creation, video production, and creative automation. Tools: Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, ChatGPT, RunwayML.

## Portfolio Highlights

- Instagram Reels & short-form video content
- YouTube thumbnail designs for content creators
- Logo and brand identity design
- Product packaging and mockup design
- YouTube channel art and banner design
- AI-generated advertising campaigns
